HPCell 0.5.0
  • Reference

    Main Function for HPCell Map Test Differential Abundance

    map2_test_differential_abundance_hpc.Rd

    This function prepares and runs a differential abundance test pipeline using the 'targets' package. It sets up necessary files, appends scripts, and executes the pipeline.

    map2_test_differential_abundance_hpc(
  data_list,
  formula_list,
  .abundance = NULL,
  store = tempfile(tmpdir = "."),
  computing_resources = crew_controller_local(workers = 1),
  cpus_per_task = 1,
  debug_job_id = NULL,
  append = FALSE,
  ...
)

    Arguments

    data_list

    list of dataframes to be processed

    formula_list

    List of formula for the differential abundance test.

    .abundance

    (optional) A symbol or string indicating the column name in the SingleCellExperiment object to be used for abundance measures. If not explicitly provided, the function attempts to automatically detect an appropriate column by examining the first object in data_list.

    store

    File path for temporary storage.

    computing_resources

    Computing resources configuration.

    cpus_per_task

    Number of CPUs allocated per task.

    debug_job_id

    Optional job ID for debugging.

    append

    Flag to append to existing script.

    ...

    additional arguments

    Value

    A targets pipeline output, typically a nested tibble with differential abundance estimates.

    Contents

    Developed by Stefano Mangiola, Jiayi Si.
